    "Spool installed backwards relative to the isometric flow arrow direction."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Issue a non-conformance report (NCR).",
    "Instruct the piping crew to unbolt/cut out the spool, rotate it to match the isometric drawing flow direction, and re-fit/re-weld as required."
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing a piping spool backwards violates the engineered isometric drawings and project specifications. This can lead to severe process issues, incorrect instrument orientation, or flow-induced wear if internal components (like orifice plates, thermowells, or eccentric reducers) are oriented incorrectly.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B31.3",
    "Project Isometric Drawings"
  ]
